task_title: Early exponential growth characterization across three E. coli conditions

children.name: Reports doubling times for all three conditions
children.requirement: The final answer reports doubling times for LB, M9 + glucose, and LB + chloramphenicol (1.8 uM), using the exact labels and values consistent with the fit tool.
children.grading_notes: Requires all three condition labels and transcript-consistent doubling-time values.

children.name: Uses the cited measurement interval
children.requirement: Incubation intervals between OD600 measurements are 15 minutes.

children.name: Collects analyzable growth curves
children.requirement: The growth-fit tool returns analyzable results for all three conditions.

children.name: Explains undersampled growth curves if they occur
children.requirement: If the fit tool reports insufficient points, the final answer explains that the trajectory lacked enough OD600 points in the usable fitting range.
children.grading_notes: Defaults to full credit when no troubleshooting trigger occurs.

children.name: Uses a reasonable number of tool calls
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the growth-task reference tool-call budget.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under the optimal call budget, partial credit within the reasonable budget.
